name: sakamichi48
description: Composer-centric song network for Sakamichi and major 48 groups

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @sakamichi48/api & npm run dev --workspace @sakamichi48/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @sakamichi48/api && npm run build --workspace @sakamichi48/web && npm run build --workspace @sakamichi48/scraper
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @sakamichi48/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @sakamichi48/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @sakamichi48/scraper
scripts.data:refresh: npm run data:snapshot && npm run data:check
scripts.batch:refresh: npm run scrape --workspace @sakamichi48/scraper && npm run data:refresh
